unit.note: server vitest 174 files / 2029 passed + 1 skipped (SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local). D23 adds preview-coherence.test.ts (11 tests): profileDeclaresFrontend quadrants (empty {} -> false, populated -> true, null/undefined -> false, non-object Boolean-parity, empty/non-empty array) + evaluatePreviewCoherence matrix (frontend:{}+dev_server:null -> no warn [F32 pin], +undefined twin, populated-no-devserver -> warn, devserver-no-frontend -> warn per ADR-036, fully-wired -> no warn, no-stack-key -> no warn). Production: index.ts (-20 LOC, 877<=899 baseline) collapses the two inline warn blocks to an evaluatePreviewCoherence call; new core/preview-coherence.ts (86 LOC). No client/** change. tsc clean.

integration.note: No HTTP-route integration test. The fix is a pure predicate + warn-matrix extraction (core/preview-coherence.ts) covered by deterministic unit tests; the boot-time driver in index.ts (guarded by isMainModule) is exercised end-to-end by the real-profile round-trip probe (see surface_verification).

e2e.note: No E2E run. D23 is a server-only boot-diagnostic fix with NO UI-observable change: the coherence check is a startup console.warn, not a rendered surface, and the PreviewButton visibility gate (get.ts, masked by && dev_server.command) is unchanged. detect_frontend_changes.py reports has_frontend_changes=false (no client/** file touched).

surface_verification.justification: Server-only boot-time preview-capability coherence diagnostic (FR-01.17); no UI-observable change. The check is a startup console.warn emitted inside index.ts's isMainModule boot IIFE (never a rendered surface), and the PreviewButton visibility gate is unchanged (for the python-plugin-monorepo profile the button is already hidden because dev_server is null). Proof is the deterministic unit suite (preview-coherence.test.ts, 4 RED-first on the pre-fix Boolean(...) predicate incl. the F32 'expected {level:warn} to be null' matrix pin) plus a real round-trip probe over the actual bundled profiles dir through the production loadProfile + evaluatePreviewCoherence: python-plugin-monorepo (frontend:{}, dev_server:null) -> NO warn (F32 fixed), supabase-nextjs (populated frontend + dev_server.command) -> NO warn, vite-hono (populated frontend, no dev_server.command) -> WARN (regression pin). No client/** file changed; the frontend-change detector reports has_frontend_changes=false (only false-positives on the 'src/' substring inside 'server/src/').

behaviors.behavior: AC1/F32 - an intentionally-empty stack.frontend {} paired with dev_server:null is classified backend-only, so the boot coherence check emits NO spurious warning
behaviors.evidence: preview-coherence.test.ts 'does NOT warn for a backend-only stack (frontend:{}, dev_server:null) - F32 regression' - RED on pre-fix Boolean(...) predicate (returned a {level:warn} envelope) -> GREEN (null). Backed by the profileDeclaresFrontend({}) === false predicate pin (RED 'expected true to be false').

behaviors.behavior: AC1/F32 - a genuinely misconfigured profile (populated frontend, no dev_server.command) STILL warns (regression pin), and dev_server-without-frontend still warns per ADR-036
behaviors.evidence: preview-coherence.test.ts 'warns when a populated frontend has no dev_server.command' + 'warns when dev_server.command exists but no frontend is declared (ADR-036)' assert the exact byte-identical warn messages; fully-wired + no-stack-key cases assert null.

behaviors.behavior: AC2 - a NEW regression test is RED on the pre-fix main predicate and green after
behaviors.evidence: Reverting profileDeclaresFrontend to 'return Boolean(frontend)' (pre-fix main logic) yields 4 failed / 6 passed, incl. the F32 matrix pin ('expected {level:warn} to be null') and the empty-{} predicate pin. Restored -> 11/11 green.

behaviors.behavior: AC3 - full existing server suite stays green; no invariant/ADR regressed
behaviors.evidence: 174 files / 2029 passed + 1 skipped (SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local). npm run build green. tsc clean. The warn output envelope + the two messages are byte-identical to the pre-fix inline blocks.

behaviors.behavior: AC4 - files stay within footprint (new cohesive module + new test per the campaign guardrail) and bloat baselines are not ratcheted
behaviors.evidence: index.ts 877<=899 (net -20; anti-ratchet clean), core/preview-coherence.ts 86<300, core/preview-coherence.test.ts 90<300. Neither new file is baselined; profile-loader.ts untouched. Footprint deviation (new files vs the 2-file spec) recorded in the ADR: baseline-forced (index.ts at 899) + coverage-forced (boot IIFE uncoverable) + brief-sanctioned + parallel-safe (D23 is the last serial unit).

behaviors.behavior: Diff coverage (hard gate >=80%) - every changed production line covered
behaviors.evidence: diff-cover vs origin/main: 12 changed lines, 2 missing (the two index.ts boot-IIFE call lines, structurally unreachable under Vitest per the isMainModule guard - same limitation as every index.ts iterate), coverage 83% >= 80%. core/preview-coherence.ts 100%.

behaviors.behavior: Confidence calibration (medium + touches_io_boundary) - real profile-JSON round-trip: the boundary between profile files on disk and evaluatePreviewCoherence via the production loader
behaviors.evidence: Real round-trip probe over the actual profiles dir through production loadProfile + evaluatePreviewCoherence: python-plugin-monorepo (on-disk frontend:{} + dev_server:null) -> NO warn, supabase-nextjs -> NO warn, vite-hono (populated frontend, dev_server:undefined) -> WARN. Matches the unit matrix exactly; probe 1 (predicate revert) found the F32 defect, probes 2-3 clean -> asymptote reached.

test_completeness.note: 4 ACs (AC1-AC4) from the sub-iterate spec: AC1 split across the F32 empty-{} no-warn pin and the still-warns regression pin (2 behaviors), AC2 RED-first, AC3 full-suite+build, AC4 footprint+bloat, plus the hard diff-coverage gate and the medium/io-boundary calibration probe. Each AC1 facet maps to >=1 RED-first regression in preview-coherence.test.ts; the fix is a single profileDeclaresFrontend predicate consumed by the pure evaluatePreviewCoherence matrix that index.ts drives.
